creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Created attachment 209382
Patch to update shells/ammonite to 1.8.2

Hi,

I've attached a patch to update shells/ammonite to 1.8.2.

### Changelog

* Started publishing bootstrap scripts, that can be easily committed to version control and download/launch Ammonite via `./amm` 
* Bump PPrint to 0.5.6
* Bump OS-Lib to 0.4.2 
* Bump uPickle to 0.8.0
* Support for Scala 2.13.1 

Regards,

Jens
